case_title: CAMERON SMITH VS. 1500 MISSION URBAN HOUSING LP

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SMITH, CAMERON AS TO DEFENDANT 1500 MISSION URBAN HOUSING LP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-22-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-22-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO APR-15-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CAMERON SMITH IS PRESENT VIA UNAURTHORIZED APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT 1500 MISSION URBAN HOUSING LP IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS ALLOWED A CONTINUANCE TO SUBMIT A TIMELY ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
